hero.subhead: The world’s first Proof Engine powered by zkTLS. Prove your bank balance, income, or credentials directly from the source—without revealing your identity or private history.
hero.visualCaption: Visual representation of the cryptographic separation between verification and data revelation.

verification.title: Sentinel Trust Receipt
verification.proofExplanation: This receipt is a cryptographic guarantee that the data above was extracted from a verified TLS session with the source institution. Sentinel used Zero-Knowledge Proofs to ensure that the user only revealed the specific fact requested, while the rest of their data remained private and end-to-end encrypted.

hero.title: Generate Financial Proof
hero.subtitle: Developer view of the raw Sentinel attestation payloads and TLSNotary proof exchange.

security.title: Security Credentials
security.calloutBody: Sentinel uses zkTLS. Your bank credentials stay local to the TLSNotary extension; only the zero-knowledge proof and minimal disclosed facts are sent to the backend.

terminal.title: Live Proof Status
terminal.ready: [Ready] Awaiting TLSNotary extension and bank interaction…
terminal.connect2: [2/3] Handing off execution to TLSNotary extension…
terminal.prove1: [Proving] Capturing MPC-TLS transcript from bank endpoint…
terminal.prove2: [Proving] Generating zero-knowledge proof for balance threshold…
terminal.submit1: [Submitting] Posting proof payload to Sentinel backend /attest…
terminal.submit2: [Submitting] Waiting for notary signature and attestation ID…
terminal.unknownError: An unknown error occurred while generating the proof.

success.title: Proof Generated Successfully
success.subtitle: Your financial credentials have been cryptographically verified by Sentinel.
success.thresholdText: ({{account}}) satisfies the configured balance threshold in {{currency}}.

hero.title: Generate Compliance Proof
hero.subtitle: Securely verify your bank data without revealing credentials.

status.error: An error occurred during proof generation.

summary.title: Verification Successful
summary.body: ({{account}}) has a balance exceeding 1,000,000 {{currency}} in the verified account.
summary.pointSource: Source cryptographically verified directly from institution.

passport.story: Andrés needed a loan. His bank asked for 6 months of statements. Every coffee, medical bill, and personal habit was exposed. Sentinel changed that.
passport.step1Body: Connect directly to your bank. Sentinel verifies the source via zkTLS without seeing your data.
passport.step2Body: Generate a mathematical proof for exactly what you need to say. Nothing more.
passport.step3Body: Send a Trust Link to your lender. They get instant certainty; you get total privacy.
passport.featureNoExposureBody: Prove solvency and income without sharing your coffee receipts or full history.
passport.featureIntegrityBody: Verified directly from the bank's TLS session. Zero chance of forgery.
passport.featureZkBody: Math-based guarantees that replace human-based reviews.

institutional.headline:
Verification at the 
Speed of Software
institutional.body: Sentinel eliminates the "PDF Integrity Crisis." Replace expensive manual reviews with cryptographic certainty for M&A, Lending, and Compliance.
institutional.oldInsecureBody: Partners share bank statements and tax filings as PDFs that are easily faked or tampered with.
institutional.oldExposureBody: M&A due diligence forces companies to reveal every transaction, customer name, and cap table detail prematurely.
institutional.oldManualBody: Underwriters and analysts spend weeks manually verifying data across disconnected silos.
institutional.sentinelOriginBody: Data is verified directly from the TLS session. No PDFs, no fakes. Just source truth.
institutional.sentinelZkBody: Prove assets, runway, and compliance without revealing specific transaction details to competitors.
institutional.sentinelInstantBody: Programmatic verification allows for instant approval of loans, ventures, and compliance checks.
institutional.b2bBody: Scaling selective revelation across high-stakes financial environments.
institutional.useCase1Body: Prove your company's assets and runway to potential buyers without sharing sensitive customer data or specific cap table details.
institutional.useCase2Body: Institutions can access special liquidity pools by proving they meet specific solvency and compliance requirements without revealing their full balance sheets.
institutional.useCase3Body: Prove specific medical conditions or insurance eligibility to providers without revealing your entire health history.
institutional.partnersBody: Join 50+ institutions building on our privacy-first infrastructure.

technical.headline: Trust Architecture
technical.body: A deep dive into the Sentinel protocol: leveraging zkTLS, Noir ZK circuits, and TLSNotary for cryptographically verifiable source truth.
technical.sectionA.title: Data Provenance via zkTLS
technical.sectionA.body: Our framework enables cryptographic attestation of data directly from secure web sessions. Sentinel acts as a "Blind Notary," ensuring data integrity without ever gaining access to the underlying session keys.
technical.sectionA.tlsnotaryBody: Three-party computation protocol for verifiable TLS 1.3 transcripts.
technical.sectionA.redactionBody: Users redact sensitive session data locally before generating the final proof.
technical.sectionB.title: AI-Generated Noir Circuits
technical.sectionB.body: Sentinel's AI engine converts natural language requirements into optimized Noir ZK circuits instantly. These circuits allow users to prove complex logic (e.g., "Monthly income > $5,000") without revealing the raw numbers.
technical.sectionB.noirDslBody: A Rust-based language for zero-knowledge proofs, optimized for the web.
technical.sectionB.backendBody: High-performance PLONK-based proof system for instant browser verification.
technical.sectionC.title: Account Abstraction
technical.sectionC.body: Built on Safe (ERC-4337) infrastructure, we provide a zero-friction user experience. Smart accounts handle the complexity of gas management and recovery, ensuring institutional accessibility.
technical.sectionC.card1Body: Users pay zero network fees. Managed by protocol-level paymasters.
technical.sectionC.card2Body: Recover access through trusted entities or institutional guardians.
technical.footer.headline: Ready for Institutional Scale
technical.footer.body: Audit-ready, battle-tested, and built for high-throughput verification.

mechanics.heroBody: Tell Sentinel what you want to reveal. Our AI builds a custom Noir ZK circuit for any website or API instantly. No cryptography degree required.
mechanics.blindfoldedBody: Sentinel verifies the validity of your information without ever seeing the sensitive data itself. We see the "Envelope," never the "Letter."
mechanics.blindfoldedLocalBody: Data extraction happens entirely on your device. Your raw bank data never touches our servers.
mechanics.blindfoldedEphemeralBody: Our server acts as an MPC participant to verify the TLS certificate while the session is still encrypted.
mechanics.blindfoldedReceiptBody: The result is a ZK-Proof link. The destination gets the "Yes" without the "What".
mechanics.networkBody: Sentinel grows with its users. Every time a new circuit is built for a specific bank or API, it becomes available for the entire network.
mechanics.networkPoint2: Reusable circuits for thousands of institutions
mechanics.networkPoint3: Instant audit-readiness for any data source
mechanics.localBody: Our 'Shielding' technology ensures that data extraction happens entirely on your device. We never send your raw sensitive data to our servers. Only the mathematical proof leaves your browser.
mechanics.ctaBody: The Yellow Sentinel Widget is the easiest way to add zkTLS verification to your dApp or website. It’s lightweight, secure, and ready for production.
